ignore: useMemo or useCallback recommendations without a concrete reason
folder restructuring without clear maintenance benefit
component splitting based only on file length
generic test requests without named behavior

critical: user-provided HTML is rendered without a sanitization boundary
high: direct state mutation can break React rendering
async effect can update state after unmount
external subscription, timer, observer, socket, or listener has no cleanup
non-semantic interactive element lacks keyboard support
medium: duplicated derived state can become stale
component mixes rendering, orchestration, mapping, validation, and policy
pure business logic inside a hook is difficult to test
API DTO shape leaks deeply into UI components
low: extraction improves readability but current behavior is low risk
naming obscures intent but does not affect behavior
optional test coverage would help future changes
